name: krometrail
description: Krometrail skills — runtime debugging and browser recording for AI agents.

skills.name: krometrail-debug
skills.description: Krometrail runtime debugging skill. Load before using debug_* MCP tools or the krometrail CLI for debugging. Covers all 10 supported languages with per-language references, breakpoint syntax, stepping strategies, and server debugging workflows.

skills.name: krometrail-chrome
skills.description: Krometrail browser observation skill. Load before using chrome_*/session_* MCP tools or the krometrail browser CLI. Covers session recording, batch browser actions, network/console/DOM capture, framework state, and investigation strategies.

skills.name: krometrail-mcp
skills.description: Krometrail MCP navigation guide. Load first to understand which tool namespace to use (debug_*, chrome_*, session_*) and which detailed skill to load next. Covers common pitfalls and per-language references for Python, Node.js, and Go.
